summary: A comprehensive, curated guide of current and upcoming graduate funding opportunities (Teaching Assistantships, Research Assistantships, Scholarships, and Fellowships) in GIS, Remote Sensing, GeoAI, and Geography. Covers specific open positions, professional society awards, federal agency fellowships, international scholarships, key university programs, and a strategic action plan for securing funding. Organized by category with deadlines, eligibility, and direct application links.
